title: Log in with a registered account
description: A registered user can sign in and reach the dashboard with an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify the session is authenticated

title: Register a new account successfully
description: A new visitor can create an account and is sent to the login page after a successful registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/register.php
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a new valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Fill in the password confirmation field with the same valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Verify the registration succeeds without validation errors

title: Save a finalized build
description: An authenticated user can save a complete build and receive a persisted build record.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the build save flow
Fill in a build name
Fill in a valid purpose
Fill in a valid BDT budget
Select a valid set of component IDs
Fill in a valid FPS value
Fill in a valid wattage value
Fill in a valid build score
Submit the build save form
Verify a saved build confirmation is visible
Verify the build is available in the user's saved builds

title: Register a new account and reach the dashboard
description: A new user can register, log in, and land on the dashboard with an authenticated session.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page
Fill in the registration form with valid new account details
Submit the registration form
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Verify authenticated account content is visible

title: Delete an owned build
description: An authenticated user can delete their own saved build and see it removed from the dashboard.
category: Save build and delete build ownership/CSRF protection

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Open one saved build from the list
Delete the build
Verify a deletion confirmation is visible
Verify the build no longer appears in the dashboard

title: Log out from an authenticated session
description: An authenticated user can end their session and return to the public home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Verify the user is redirected to the public home page
Verify the authenticated session is cleared

title: Block build save without authentication
description: A user without an authenticated session cannot save a build.

steps.description: Navigate to the build save flow
Fill in a build name
Fill in a valid purpose
Fill in a valid BDT budget
Select a valid set of component IDs
Submit the build save form
Verify an authentication required message is visible
Verify the build is not saved

title: Detect an incompatible CPU and motherboard pairing
description: An authenticated user can see a compatibility issue when the chosen CPU and motherboard do not match.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the build compatibility page
Select a CPU
Select a motherboard with a different socket
Check build compatibility
Verify the build is marked incompatible
Verify a socket mismatch issue is shown

title: Reject an invalid login attempt
description: A user who enters the wrong password stays signed out and sees a login error.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the user remains signed out

title: Log out and end the authenticated session
description: An authenticated user can log out and is returned to a signed-out state.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the account menu
Log out of the account
Verify the signed-out state is displayed
Verify authenticated dashboard content is no longer visible

title: Validate compatible core parts for a build
description: An authenticated user can check a full set of selected parts and see that the build is compatible when the parts match.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the build compatibility page
Select a CPU
Select a motherboard
Select a GPU
Select RAM
Select a PSU
Check build compatibility
Verify the build is marked compatible
Verify no compatibility issues are shown

title: Prevent deleting a build the user does not own
description: An authenticated user cannot delete another user's build and sees an ownership protection message.
category: Save build and delete build ownership/CSRF protection

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open a build detail page that is not owned by the current user
Attempt to delete the build
Verify an ownership protection message is displayed
Verify the build remains available

title: Reject build deletion with invalid CSRF token
description: The system blocks a build deletion attempt when the CSRF token is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a saved build detail view
Attempt to delete the build with an invalid CSRF token
Verify a CSRF validation error is visible
Verify the build remains available

title: Reject component browsing without authentication
description: A visitor without a valid session cannot access authenticated component browsing results.

steps.description: Navigate to the component browsing page
Attempt to load the component list
Verify an unauthorized access state is visible
Verify components are not displayed

title: Add a component to the watchlist
description: An authenticated user can add a component to their watchlist and see it persisted in the watchlist view.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open a component detail view
Add the component to the watchlist
Verify the component appears in the watchlist
Verify the watchlist shows the added item

title: Block deletion of another user's build
description: An authenticated user cannot delete a build they do not own.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open a build detail view for a build the user does not own
Attempt to delete the build
Verify an access denied message is visible
Verify the build remains available

title: Remove a component from the watchlist
description: An authenticated user can remove a watched component and see it disappear from the watchlist.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the watchlist
Remove one watched component
Verify the component is removed from the watchlist
Verify the watchlist updates to reflect the removal

title: Load filtered component results for an authenticated user
description: An authenticated user can retrieve matching components by category and budget and see a populated result list.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the component browsing page
Select a GPU category filter
Fill in a valid maximum budget
Submit the component search
Verify matching components are displayed
Verify each result reflects the selected filter

title: Allocate a budget for a gaming build
description: A user can choose a gaming purpose and budget and receive category allocations that favor core performance parts.

steps.description: Navigate to the build wizard
Select the gaming purpose profile
Fill in a valid total budget in BDT
Submit the budget allocation request
Verify category allocation values are displayed
Verify the GPU and CPU allocations are higher than less critical categories

title: Access the dashboard with an authenticated session
description: A logged-in user can open the dashboard and see saved build information.
category: Dashboard access to saved builds and build details

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Verify saved builds are displayed
Verify dashboard-level account content is visible

title: Open a saved build from the dashboard
description: A logged-in user can open a saved build from the dashboard and view its details.
category: Dashboard access to saved builds and build details

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the dashboard
Open one saved build from the list
Verify build details are displayed
Verify the selected build is shown in detail view

title: Block watchlist changes without authentication
description: A user without an authenticated session cannot modify the watchlist.

steps.description: Navigate to a component detail page
Attempt to add the component to the watchlist
Verify an authentication required message is visible
Verify the component is not watched

title: View price history for a component
description: An authenticated user can open a component price history view and see chart data for the selected date range.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open a component detail view that supports price history
Select a supported date range
Verify price history labels are displayed
Verify price history values are displayed

title: Show validation errors for incomplete registration
description: A visitor who submits invalid registration details sees validation feedback and cannot create an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/register.php
Submit the registration form without entering required fields
Verify registration validation errors are visible
Verify the account is not created

title: Use the chatbot for build guidance
description: An authenticated user can send a message to the chatbot and receive a reply in the chat interface.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the chatbot panel
Send a build guidance message
Verify a chatbot reply is displayed
Verify the conversation contains the user message and assistant reply

title: Reject mismatched build totals
description: The system rejects a build save when the submitted totals do not match the selected components.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the build save flow
Select a valid set of component IDs
Fill in a build name
Fill in a valid purpose
Fill in a valid BDT budget
Fill in a mismatched build score
Fill in a mismatched wattage value
Submit the build save form
Verify a build validation error is visible
Verify the build is not saved

title: Allocate a budget for an office build
description: A user can choose an office purpose and budget and receive category allocations that reflect a productivity-focused build.

steps.description: Navigate to the build wizard
Select the office purpose profile
Fill in a valid total budget in BDT
Submit the budget allocation request
Verify category allocation values are displayed
Verify the CPU, RAM, and storage allocations are displayed for the selected purpose

title: Show a broader component list without filters
description: An authenticated user can browse components without narrowing filters and still receive results.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the component browsing page
Clear any active category filter
Clear any active budget filter
Submit the component search
Verify a broader component list is displayed

title: Score valid candidate builds in ranked order
description: This verifies that submitting valid build candidates for a purpose produces ranked recommendations ordered by composite score.

steps.description: Navigate to the build scoring flow
Submit a valid purpose and budget with multiple complete build candidates
Verify ranked build recommendations are displayed
Verify the top candidates are ordered by score

title: Prefer stronger and available parts in scoring
description: This verifies that a build with stronger benchmark scores and in-stock parts is ranked above a weaker or less available alternative.

steps.description: Navigate to the build scoring flow
Submit two valid build candidates with the same purpose and budget
Ensure one candidate uses stronger in-stock parts
Verify the stronger in-stock build is ranked higher
Verify availability is reflected in the ranking output

title: Allocate a budget for a general build
description: A user can choose a general purpose and budget and receive a balanced allocation across component categories.

steps.description: Navigate to the build wizard
Select the general purpose profile
Fill in a valid total budget in BDT
Submit the budget allocation request
Verify category allocation values are displayed
Verify the allocations are balanced across major component categories

title: Reject an incomplete build save
description: The system rejects invalid build data when required build fields are missing or malformed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the build save flow
Leave the component selection empty
Fill in a build name
Fill in a valid purpose
Fill in a valid BDT budget
Submit the build save form
Verify a build validation error is visible
Verify the build is not saved

title: Create a component through the admin panel
description: An admin can add a new component and see it appear in the component list.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the admin credentials
Submit the login form
Open the admin component page
Create a new component with valid details
Verify the new component appears in the list
Verify the component detail content is available

title: Edit an existing component as an admin
description: An admin can update a component and see the revised data reflected in the admin list or detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the admin credentials
Submit the login form
Open an existing component in the admin panel
Edit the component details
Verify the updated component data is displayed
Verify the component remains available after editing

title: Prefer better value for budget when comparing builds
description: This verifies that two valid builds with different BDT totals are ranked in a way that reflects value relative to budget.

steps.description: Navigate to the build scoring flow
Submit two valid build candidates with different total BDT costs
Verify value-weighted ranking is displayed
Verify the better value build is ranked appropriately

title: Delete a component as an admin
description: An admin can delete a component and see it removed from the admin listing.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the admin credentials
Submit the login form
Open an existing component in the admin panel
Delete the component
Verify the component is removed from the list
Verify a deletion confirmation is visible

title: Reject invalid watchlist requests
description: The system shows a validation error when watchlist parameters are missing or invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the watchlist action UI
Submit the watchlist action without a valid component selection
Verify a watchlist validation error is visible
Verify the watchlist count is unchanged

title: Bulk update component pricing and stock as an admin
description: An admin can submit a bulk pricing and stock update and see the affected component data change in the admin view.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the admin credentials
Submit the login form
Open the admin bulk update page
Submit a bulk pricing and stock update
Verify updated price and stock data are displayed
Verify the affected components reflect the new values

title: Rank builds with performance and availability weighting
description: This verifies that candidates with stronger performance and availability characteristics receive higher composite scores.

steps.description: Navigate to the build scoring flow
Submit multiple valid build candidates with different performance and stock profiles
Verify higher-performing and available builds receive higher scores
Verify the ranking reflects composite scoring rather than only total cost

title: Show chatbot rate limiting after repeated messages
description: An authenticated user eventually receives a rate limit message after sending too many chatbot requests.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the chatbot panel
Send repeated build guidance messages until the limit is exceeded
Verify a rate limit message is displayed
Verify additional chatbot replies are blocked

title: Reduce ranking quality for incomplete build data
description: This verifies that incomplete build inputs do not produce a misleading high-confidence ranking and are handled as weak candidates.

steps.description: Navigate to the build scoring flow
Submit a build candidate set with missing component data
Verify the scoring output reflects reduced confidence or rejected candidates
Verify incomplete candidates are not presented as fully valid recommendations

title: Handle malformed component selections in compatibility checking
description: An authenticated user who submits invalid component selections sees validation feedback instead of a successful compatibility result.

steps.description: Navigate to /myproject/login.php
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the build compatibility page
Enter an invalid component selection for one or more categories
Check build compatibility
Verify validation issues are visible
Verify a compatible result is not shown

title: Handle invalid build combinations in scoring
description: This verifies that clearly invalid build combinations are not accepted as top recommendations in the scoring output.

steps.description: Navigate to the build scoring flow
Submit a build candidate set with an invalid component combination
Verify invalid candidates are not ranked as valid recommendations
Verify the output indicates the candidate set is unsuitable

title: Reject an unsupported purpose in budget allocation
description: A user entering an unsupported purpose receives validation or fallback behavior instead of a usable allocation.

steps.description: Navigate to the build wizard
Select an unsupported purpose value
Fill in a valid total budget in BDT
Submit the budget allocation request
Verify a validation or fallback message is displayed
Verify category allocation values are not produced

title: Reject an invalid budget amount
description: A user cannot submit a negative or non-numeric budget and receive allocations.

steps.description: Navigate to the build wizard
Select a purpose profile
Fill in a negative or non-numeric budget value
Submit the budget allocation request
Verify a budget validation error is displayed
Verify category allocation values are not produced

title: Block chatbot access without a session
description: A guest user cannot use the chatbot and is shown an unauthorized state.

steps.description: Navigate to the chatbot panel
Send a build guidance message
Verify an unauthorized state is displayed
Verify no chatbot reply is displayed

title: Handle missing component selection for price history
description: An authenticated user requesting price history without choosing a component sees a validation error instead of chart data.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open the price history view without selecting a component
Request price history data
Verify a component selection validation error is displayed
Verify price history chart data is not displayed

title: Open price history with an out-of-range date range
description: An authenticated user can request an unsupported range and still see handled price history output for the component.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open a component detail view that supports price history
Select an unsupported date range
Verify price history output is displayed
Verify the chart data is handled without a crash

title: Show an empty price history state for a fresh install
description: An authenticated user viewing a component with no tracking data sees an empty chart state rather than broken output.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials
Submit the login form
Open a component detail view that has no tracked price data
Select a supported date range
Verify an empty price history state is displayed
Verify no chart values are shown
